business_goal: Announce the launch of our new mobile app to existing customers and drive first-week downloads.
target_market: Existing paying customers (about 3,200 accounts) via email and in-app, plus general audience via social
current_context: App launches in 10 days, includes offline mode and push notifications as headline features.
constraints: Needs an email sequence (3 emails) plus 5 social posts, launch date is fixed and cannot slip.

past_campaign_performance.notes: Subject lines with a specific feature name outperformed generic ones
Organic only, no promotion behind it
